findings.evidence: `rg "submonoidContinuousConstSMul|continuousConstSMul" code/TauCeti/Topology/Algebra/ConstMulAction.lean -n` shows `private instance submonoidContinuousConstSMul` at lines 22-23 and the only public transfer is `Subgroup.continuousConstSMul` at lines 29-32.
findings.fix: Expose the line 22 instance publicly in `namespace Submonoid`, e.g. `instance continuousConstSMul {M X} [MulOneClass M] [TopologicalSpace X] [SMul M X] [ContinuousConstSMul M X] (S : Submonoid M) : ContinuousConstSMul S X`, then derive or keep the subgroup instance as a specialization.
findings.issue: The natural transfer is for `Submonoid`, but it is private and only the `Subgroup` specialization is public, so users restricting a continuous action to a submonoid still get no API.

summary: The diffeomorphism action statements are at the expected generality, but the new generic continuity-transfer API exposes only the subgroup special case despite proving the submonoid case internally.
